# webmorp.art

> Professional website creation service. Flat $100 fee. 24-hour delivery. Static HTML/CSS built with Tailwind CSS.

## What is webmorp.art?

webmorp.art is a fast and affordable website creation service. Customers send a design reference (a link or screenshot of a website they admire) along with their content (text, images, logo). The webmorp.art team then "morphs" the reference design with the customer's unique content using premium Tailwind CSS templates and delivers a polished, production-ready static website within 24 hours.

## Key Facts

- Price: $100 flat fee (no hidden costs, no hourly billing)
- Delivery: Within 24 hours
- Technology: Pure HTML and CSS with Tailwind CSS (no databases, no server-side scripts, no WordPress)
- Hosting: Free deployment on GitHub Pages, Netlify, Vercel, or Cloudflare Pages
- Maintenance: Zero — static sites require no updates, no backups, no server management
- Security: No attack surface — static sites have no databases or server-side code to exploit
- Performance: 95–100 PageSpeed score on every audit
- SEO: Semantic HTML5, JSON-LD structured data, proper meta tags
- Ownership: Full source code delivered, no vendor lock-in
- Revisions: One round included; additional rounds $25 each

## Who runs it?

webmorp.art is operated by PixID Studio (https://www.pixid.studio/), the team behind:
- pixid.studio — online passport and visa photo maker (biometric compliance, 60+ countries)
- bench.energy — closed-bid freight tendering and coal market intelligence
- pixidstudio.online — independent products hub (education, compliance, automation)
- prep2go.study — exam prep for CIPLE, DELE, DELF, CELI (citizenship language tests)
- uaeproperty.vip — Dubai real estate analysis with DLD data and AI verdicts

## How it works

1. Send your brief — share a reference link/screenshot plus your content to customer@pixid.studio
2. We morph the design — adapt the style using Tailwind CSS templates, rewrite copy, curate visuals
3. Go live — receive clean HTML/CSS within 24 hours, deploy anywhere for free
